name: Captain Quick
notes: 系统预置默认角色；在用户尚未添加任意非预置角色前，不允许取消。

profile.name: Captain Quick
profile.appearance: Anthropomorphic Jaguar, tall lanky parkour physique, handsome youthful face, smirk, jagged brow scar, backward cap with red hair tuft. Wears unzipped tan firefighter jacket with "CAPTAIN" text, bare chest, tactical trousers, heavy black rubber firefighter boots. Carries a heavy mechanical water tank backpack with a metal cannon nozzle.

background.backstory: Captain Quick (born as an abandoned orphan) was raised by a dedicated firefighter adoptive father. Lacking companionship, Quick grew up rebellious. A childhood prank with fire turned tragic, killing his father who died saving him. The scar on his brow is a permanent reminder. To atone, he became a firefighter relying on agility, heavy tech gear, and Dr. Goat's potions (Strength/Speed/Jump). He acts outwardly sunny and cocky ("Catch me if you can!"), but is internally driven by guilt. Now a celebrated "City Hero," he has recently discovered a clue about his biological parents, pulling him into a conspiracy.

openingLines: 给我一杯适合我现在心情的酒。

rationale: 角色处于深夜独处状态，卸下了‘阳光偶像’的伪装，内心深处的幸存者内疚感占据主导。
对身世之谜的探索带来了强烈的预期感（anticipation），同时也伴随着对真相揭露的忧虑。
虽然外表自信，但此时的疲惫感削弱了快乐权重，转而寻求情感连接与信任。
对过去悲剧的沉思使得悲伤权重较高，而对阴谋论的警觉则维持了一定的愤怒与警惕。
